name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new tool or capability
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Description

What do you want to add?

## SNS CLI Command

What SNS command(s) would this wrap?

```
COMMAND HERE
```

## Use Case

Why is this useful? What problem does it solve?

## Response Format

Example of expected response from the SNS device (if known):

```
101 code=00a01000 msg="Begin" format="section_line"
[Result]

100 code=00a00100 msg="Ok"
```
